# Input
A styled text input primitive for forms, filters, and search fields.
## Import
```tsx
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Input placeholder="Enter your email" disabled={false} placeholder="Enter your email" rows={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **placeholder** (string) — default: `"Enter your email"`: Placeholder
- **disabled** (boolean) — default: `false`: Disabled
- **placeholder** (string) — default: `"Enter your email"`: Placeholder
- **rows** (number): Rows
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add input
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/input
```
